overall.description: Gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima showing a samurai warrior in traditional armor running through a rainy forest at night. The character traverses from a watery swamp area through a path lined with white pampas grass toward a distant torch light, with heavy rainfall and blue atmospheric lighting throughout.

scene_state.functional_zone: swampy forest with shallow water and bare trees

agents.ego_description: running through shallow water in a dark forest during heavy rainfall

entered.detail: leafless deciduous trees with twisted branches silhouetted against the dark sky
shallow water covering the forest floor with rain droplets creating ripples
decayed logs and branches scattered along the water's edge
exposed root systems of large trees emerging from the water

segments.scene_description: The samurai character runs through a swampy forest area with bare trees and shallow water covering the ground. Rain falls steadily in the dark, blue-tinted environment with twisted tree branches forming a canopy overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with stone lantern marker

events.description: location name 'OTSUNA' appears on screen indicating entry into new region

agents.ego_description: running along a dirt path passing a traditional stone lantern on the right

entered.detail: traditional Japanese stone lantern with glowing light near the path
dark pine and cedar trees lining the left side of the trail
narrow dirt path winding through the forest
stack of stones and rocks beside the path

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from water to a dirt path as the location name 'OTSUNA' appears in the corner. A stone lantern becomes visible on the right side of the path among evergreen trees, marking the entry into a more defined trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest path lined with white pampas grass

events.description: entering area with tall white pampas grass swaying on both sides of the path

agents.ego_description: running through tall white grass flanking both sides of the forest trail

entered.detail: tall white plumes of pampas grass swaying in the wind and rain

segments.scene_description: The path becomes densely lined with distinctive white pampas grass swaying in the rain. The character continues deeper into the forest as the vegetation grows thicker on both sides of the trail.

events.description: warm torch light becomes visible in the distance ahead, contrasting with the blue environment

agents.ego_description: approaching a torch light source while moving through grassy terrain toward the illumination

entered.detail: bright warm torch or campfire glowing in the distance through the trees

segments.scene_description: A warm torch light appears in the distance, providing the first artificial illumination in the scene and contrasting with the cool blue rainfall. The character continues running toward this light source through grassy terrain as the torch grows larger in the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy, blue-tinted forest that transitions from a desolate swamp into a guided path toward a distant light. It begins with a samurai running through shallow water and bare, twisted trees under a steady downpour. As the character moves forward, the watery terrain shifts into a dirt path marked by a stone lantern among evergreen trees. The scene then expands into a corridor of dense, swaying white pampas grass that lines the trail as the character pushes deeper into the woods. Finally, the cool atmospheric tones are broken by a warm torch light appearing in the distance, which grows larger as the character runs toward the artificial glow.
